existing_features.title: On the frontend, gracefully handle authorization errors returned from the backend for store product operations. Display a user-friendly error message (e.g., toast notification) when an unauthorized action is attempted, rather than crashing or showing a raw error.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement backend access control so that only the store owner (or an admin) can create, update, and delete products within a specific store. Calls from principals who do not own the store must return an authorization error.

projectName: Add access control for store operators
